title: Simple Chicken with Mushrooms over Jasmine Rice
cScaleSummary: C2 because boneless skinless chicken breast is the primary cholesterol contributor. Jasmine rice, mushrooms, onion, garlic, herbs, and lemon add little to no cholesterol.
ldlActiveSummary: LDL-Active is false because the meal is centered on poultry rather than a fiber-forward base built primarily from legumes, whole grains, nuts, or seeds.
intro: Quick skillet chicken and mushrooms with a light lemon-garlic pan sauce over fluffy jasmine rice.

items.prep: rinsed until water runs mostly clear

stepGroups.title: Cook the Rice
items: Combine rice ({{quantity:jasmine-rice}}), water ({{quantity:water}}), and salt ({{quantity:salt-rice}}) in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce to low, and cook 15 minutes. Rest off heat 10 minutes, then fluff.

stepGroups.title: Brown the Chicken
items: Pat chicken dry. Season with two-thirds of the salt ({{quantity:salt-chicken}}) and all pepper ({{quantity:pepper}}). Heat 2 teaspoons olive oil ({{quantity:olive-oil}}) in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken 4 to 6 minutes until lightly browned and just cooked through; transfer to a plate.

stepGroups.title: Cook Mushrooms and Finish
items: Add remaining olive oil ({{quantity:olive-oil}}), mushrooms ({{quantity:mushrooms}}), and remaining salt ({{quantity:salt-chicken}}). Cook 6 to 8 minutes until browned. Add onion ({{quantity:onion}}) and cook 2 minutes; add garlic ({{quantity:garlic}}) for 30 seconds.

Add broth ({{quantity:broth}}) and simmer 2 minutes, scraping the pan. Return chicken and any juices; toss 1 to 2 minutes until hot and glazed. Turn off heat and stir in lemon juice ({{quantity:lemon-juice}}) and parsley ({{quantity:parsley}}).

stepGroups.title: Serve
items: Spoon rice into bowls and top with the chicken, mushrooms, and pan sauce.
